summary: Prepare a safe double-jump scaffold preview for the selected character script.
steps: Locate the attached script referenced by the selected node.
Preview new jump-count state and a guarded second-jump branch.
Leave TODO markers so the plugin can present the scaffold as a reviewable local patch.
preview_changes: Insert a second-jump branch guarded by TODO comments.

preview_sections.title: Preview Changes
lines: Insert a second-jump branch guarded by TODO comments.

preview_sections.title: Execution Boundary
lines: Core returns a preview patch only.
Plugin must keep actual editor mutation local and confirm before apply.

confirmation_details.reason: This preview targets an attached script and outlines a local scaffold the plugin would later apply inside the editor.
review_items: Confirm the attached script path is the intended target.
Review the placeholder jump counter state before apply.
Review the guarded second-jump branch and TODO markers before apply.

engine_mutations: none: plan preview only; plugin execution required
rollback_strategy: Do not apply automatically. Remove the scaffolded method and state additions if the user later rejects the plan.
